payload.answer: I could not verify or store the article content because fetching the URL failed with a 404 network error. I can only note that you wanted this URL remembered as relevant to memory architecture, with the failure caveat.

entity_resolution.reason: The URL could not be fetched and no existing durable entity can be confidently resolved from article content.

memory_cards.statement: The user asked to remember the article at https://example.com/missing as useful for memory architecture, but the article could not be fetched because the mock fetch returned a 404 network error; no article content was verified.

details: No article content was available to commit as durable memory.
A caveated source reference can be retained only as an unverified requested URL.
